rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Re Amended Petition Of Ernest Lentfer To Perpetuate Testimony Of Minor Lentfer By Videotaped Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, August 30, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Ernest Lentfer¿s amended petition to perpetuate testimony of Minor Lentfer by videotaped deposition is denied. The supplemental papers fail to address the issues raised at the prior hearing. Specifically, petitioner fails to set forth facts why any of the parties expected to be named as defendants in the anticipated survival and wrongful death action were not named as defendants in Minor Lentfer¿s personal injury lawsuit. Nor does petitioner state as to any of the parties expected to be named as defendants in the anticipated survival and wrongful death lawsuit when it was determined that Minor Lentfer had relevant testimony to provide as to those parties or whether any of those parties were mentioned in discovery responses served by Minor Lentfer in his personal injury lawsuit so that the defendants who were named in that lawsuit could make appropriate Proposition 51 inquiry about them. Absent unusual circumstances, it is a misuse of scarce judicial resources and contrary to the purposes underlying Proposition 51 to permit trial preservation testimony of a person after his own asbestos personal injury lawsuit has been resolved. No such unusual circumstances have been shown here. = (220/HEK)
